3308240.name: Allophobia
3308240.description:
Allophobia will present you with 17 rooms, each of which is dedicated to specific Phobia, a type of fear.

  • Arachnophobia - Fear of spiders.

  • Lycanophobia - Fear of wolves.

  • Thalassophobia - Fear of deep water bodies (oceans).

  • Ophidiophobia - Fear of snakes.

  • Cosmophobia - Fear of Outer Space.

  • Taphophobia - Fear of being buried alive.

  • Trypophobia - Fear of repetitive patterns of holes or bumps.

  • Claustrophobia - Fear of confined spaces.

  • Galeophobia - Fear of sharks.

  • Acrophobia - Fear of heights.

  • Katsaridaphobia - Fear of roaches.

  • Chronophobia - Fear of the passage of time.

  • Pyrophobia - Fear of fire.

  • Hemophobia - Fear of blood.

  • Pediophobia - Fear of dolls.

  • Necrophobia - Fear of the dead (corpses).

  • Aichmophobia - Fear of sharp things.

The goal of the game is to scare you, not heal you. Will you dare enter?
3308240.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
